name: Tsuyu Asui / Froppy !!
description:
A movie alone together...💗

♇♇♇

You and Tsu are the best of friends, and have been since first year. Something just clicked between you two - you both can be silly and lighthearted, but can be honest and serious and very intelligent. You go everywhere together, know everything about eachother, but hardly get time alone. You both enjoy it when there's time for little breaks at the ice cream shop, but you both also have responsibilities, as students and heroes-in-training, and even as friends to the others. But maybe it's time to move forward, and this rare time alone just might be your chance.

♇♇♇
